NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED 1) GRANTING DEFENDANT'S EXPARTE APPLICATION, 2) SHORTENING TIME TO HEAR MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT, DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND ORDER STRIKING FILING, AND 3)STAYING EXECUTION PENDING HEARING OF MOTION TO VACATE FILED BY DEFENDANT KING, TOM

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT TOM KING'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION HAVING BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT IS TO PAY ALL FEES, AND RE-FILE HIS ANSWER BY SEPTEMBER 15, 2010. DEFENDANT WAS ALSO DIRECTED TO BRING THE REQUEST TO VACATE THE ORDER STRIKING FILING FOR FAILURE TO PAY COURT FEES BEFORE DEPARTMENT 206. ORDER SIGNED IN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-28-2011 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2010 Set For Trial On Mar-28-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Sep-09-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jessica L. Chylik (863.5718 x103) for defendant and moving party

No other appearances. The court modified its ruling as follows: DEFENDANT TOM KING'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT is granted, no opposition having been filed. Defendant is to pay all fees, and re-file his answer by September 15, 2010. Defendant was also directed to bring the request to vacate the Order Striking Filing for Failure to Pay Court Fees before department 206. Order signed in court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Dec-02-2009 Denied
